 49→/**
 50→ * Linting trailing comma for declaration site.
 51→ *
 52→ * @see [Kotlin Style Guide](https://kotlinlang.org/docs/coding-conventions.html#trailing-commas)
 53→ */
 54→public class TrailingCommaOnDeclarationSiteRule :
 55→    StandardRule(
 56→        id = "trailing-comma-on-declaration-site",
 57→        visitorModifiers = setOf(
 58→            VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 59→                ruleId = WRAPPING_RULE_ID,
 60→                loadOnlyWhenOtherRuleIsLoaded = true,
 61→                runOnlyWhenOtherRuleIsEnabled = true,
 62→            ),
 63→            VisitorModifier.RunAsLateAsPossible,
 64→        ),
 65→    ),
 66→    UsesEditorConfigProperties {
 67→    override val editorConfigProperties: List<EditorConfigProperty<*>> = listOf(
 68→        TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_PROPERTY,
 69→    )
 70→
 71→    private var allowTrailingComma by Delegates.notNull<Boolean>()
 72→
 73→    private fun ASTNode.isTrailingCommaAllowed() = elementType in TYPES_ON_DECLARATION_SITE && allowTrailingComma
 74→
 75→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfigProperties: EditorConfigProperties) {
 76→        allowTrailingComma = editorConfigProperties.getEditorConfigValue(TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_PROPERTY)
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 80→        node: ASTNode,
 81→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 82→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 83→    ) {
 84→        // Keep processing of element types in sync with Intellij Kotlin formatting settings.
 85→        // https://github.com/JetBrains/intellij-kotlin/blob/master/formatter/src/org/jetbrains/kotlin/idea/formatter/trailingComma/util.kt
 86→        when (node.elementType) {
 87→            CLASS -> visitClass(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 88→            DESTRUCTURING_DECLARATION -> visitDestructuringDeclaration(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 89→            FUNCTION_LITERAL -> visitFunctionLiteral(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 90→            TYPE_PARAMETER_LIST -> visitTypeList(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 91→            VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST -> visitValueList(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 92→            WHEN_ENTRY -> visitWhenEntry(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 93→            else -> Unit
 94→        }
 95→    }
 96→
 97→    private fun visitDestructuringDeclaration(
 98→        node: ASTNode,
 99→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
100→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
101→    ) {
102→        val inspectNode = node
103→            .children()
104→            .last { it.elementType == ElementType.RPAR }
105→        node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
106→            inspectNode = inspectNode,
107→            isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
108→            autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
109→            emit = emit,
110→        )
111→    }
112→
113→    private fun visitFunctionLiteral(
114→        node: ASTNode,
115→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
116→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
117→    ) {
118→        val inspectNode = node
119→            .children()
120→            .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ARROW }
121→            ?: // lambda w/o an arrow -> no arguments -> no commas
122→            return
123→        node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
124→            inspectNode = inspectNode,
125→            isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
126→            autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
127→            emit = emit,
128→        )
129→    }
130→
131→    private fun visitValueList(
132→        node: ASTNode,
133→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
134→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
135→    ) {
136→        if (node.treeParent.elementType != FUNCTION_LITERAL) {
137→            node
138→                .children()
139→                .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ElementType.RPAR }
140→                ?.let { inspectNode ->
141→                    node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
142→                        inspectNode = inspectNode,
143→                        isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
144→                        autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
145→                        emit = emit,
146→                    )
147→                }
148→        }
149→    }
150→
151→    private fun visitTypeList(
152→        node: ASTNode,
153→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
154→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
155→    ) {
156→        val inspectNode = node
157→            .children()
158→            .first { it.elementType == ElementType.GT }
159→        node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
160→            inspectNode = inspectNode,
161→            isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
162→            autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
163→            emit = emit,
164→        )
165→    }
166→
167→    private fun visitWhenEntry(
168→        node: ASTNode,
169→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
170→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
171→    ) {
172→        val psi = node.psi
173→        require(psi is KtWhenEntry)
174→        if (psi.isElse || psi.parent.cast<KtWhenExpression>().leftParenthesis == null) {
175→            // no commas for "else" or when there are no opening parenthesis for the when-expression
176→            return
177→        }
178→
179→        val inspectNode = node
180→            .children()
181→            .first { it.elementType == ARROW }
182→        node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
183→            inspectNode = inspectNode,
184→            isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
185→            autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
186→            emit = emit,
187→        )
188→    }
189→    private fun visitClass(
190→        node: ASTNode,
191→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
192→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
193→    ) {
194→        val psi = node.psi
195→        require(psi is KtClass)
196→
197→        node
198→            .takeIf { psi.isEnum() }
199→            ?.findChildByType(ElementType.CLASS_BODY)
200→            ?.takeUnless {
201→                // Do nothing when last two entries are on same line as no trailing comma should be inserted
202→                it.lastTwoEnumEntriesAreOnSameLine()
203→            }?.let { classBody ->
204→                val nodeAfterTrailingCommaPosition = classBody.findNodeAfterTrailingCommaPosition()
205→                node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
206→                    inspectNode = nodeAfterTrailingCommaPosition,
207→                    isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
208→                    autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
209→                    emit = emit,
210→                )
211→            }
212→    }
213→
214→    /**
215→     * Determines the [ASTNode] before which the trailing comma is allowed.
216→     *
217→     * If the list of enumeration entries is terminated by a semicolon, that semicolon will be returned. Otherwise, the
218→     * last element of the class.
219→     */
220→    private fun ASTNode.findNodeAfterTrailingCommaPosition(): ASTNode {
221→        val lastEnumEntry = children().last { it.psi is KtEnumEntry }
222→
223→        val semicolonAfterLastEnumEntry = lastEnumEntry
224→            .children()
225→            .singleOrNull { it.elementType == ElementType.SEMICOLON }
226→
227→        return semicolonAfterLastEnumEntry ?: lastChildNode
228→    }
229→
230→    private fun ASTNode.lastTwoEnumEntriesAreOnSameLine(): Boolean {
231→        val lastTwoEnumEntries =
232→            children()
233→                .filter { it.psi is KtEnumEntry }
234→                .toList()
235→                .takeLast(2)
236→
237→        return lastTwoEnumEntries.count() == 2 && noNewLineInClosedRange(lastTwoEnumEntries[0], lastTwoEnumEntries[1])
238→    }
239→
240→    private fun ASTNode.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
241→        inspectNode: ASTNode,
242→        isTrailingCommaAllowed: Boolean,
243→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
244→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
245→    ) {
246→        val prevLeaf = inspectNode.prevLeaf()
247→        val trailingCommaNode = prevLeaf?.findPreviousTrailingCommaNodeOrNull()
248→        val trailingCommaState = when {
249→            isMultiline(psi) -> if (trailingCommaNode != null) TrailingCommaState.EXISTS else TrailingCommaState.MISSING
250→            else -> if (trailingCommaNode != null) TrailingCommaState.REDUNDANT else TrailingCommaState.NOT_EXISTS
251→        }
252→        when (trailingCommaState) {
253→            TrailingCommaState.EXISTS ->
254→                if (isTrailingCommaAllowed) {
255→                    inspectNode
256→                        .treeParent
257→                        .takeIf { it.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY }
258→                        ?.findChildByType(ARROW)
259→                        ?.prevLeaf()
260→                        ?.let { lastNodeBeforeArrow ->
261→                            if (lastNodeBeforeArrow.elementType != WHITE_SPACE || !lastNodeBeforeArrow.textContains('\n')) {
262→                                emit(
263→                                    trailingCommaNode!!.startOffset,
264→                                    "Expected a newline between the trailing comma and  \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
265→                                    true,
266→                                )
267→                                if (autoCorrect) {
268→                                    val parentIndent = "\n" + inspectNode.getWhenEntryIndent()
269→                                    lastNodeBeforeArrow.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(parentIndent)
270→                                }
271→                            }
272→                        }
273→                } else {
274→                    emit(
275→                        trailingCommaNode!!.startOffset,
276→                        "Unnecessary trailing comma before \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
277→                        true,
278→                    )
279→                    if (autoCorrect) {
280→                        this.removeChild(trailingCommaNode)
281→                    }
282→                }
283→            TrailingCommaState.MISSING ->
284→                if (isTrailingCommaAllowed) {
285→                    val addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhenEntry = addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhen()
286→                    val prevNode = inspectNode.prevCodeLeaf()!!
287→                    if (addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhenEntry) {
288→                        emit(
289→                            prevNode.startOffset + prevNode.textLength,
290→                            "Missing trailing comma and newline before \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
291→                            true,
292→                        )
293→                    } else {
294→                        emit(
295→                            prevNode.startOffset + prevNode.textLength,
296→                            "Missing trailing comma before \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
297→                            true,
298→                        )
299→                    }
300→                    if (autoCorrect) {
301→                        if (addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhenEntry) {
302→                            val parentIndent = "\n" + prevNode.getWhenEntryIndent()
303→                            val leafBeforeArrow = (psi as KtWhenEntry).arrow?.prevLeaf()
304→                            if (leafBeforeArrow != null && leafBeforeArrow is PsiWhiteSpace) {
305→                                val newLine = KtPsiFactory(prevNode.psi).createWhiteSpace(parentIndent)
306→                                leafBeforeArrow.replace(newLine)
307→                            } else {
308→                                val newLine = KtPsiFactory(prevNode.psi).createWhiteSpace(parentIndent)
309→                                prevNode.psi.parent.addAfter(newLine, prevNode.psi)
310→                            }
311→                        }
312→
313→                        val comma = KtPsiFactory(prevNode.psi).createComma()
314→                        if (inspectNode.treeParent.elementType == ElementType.ENUM_ENTRY) {
315→                            with(KtPsiFactory(prevNode.psi)) {
316→                                val parentIndent =
317→                                    (prevNode.psi.parent.prevLeaf() as? PsiWhiteSpace)?.text
318→                                        ?: "\n${prevNode.lineIndent()}"
319→                                val newline = createWhiteSpace(parentIndent)
320→                                val enumEntry = inspectNode.treeParent.psi
321→                                enumEntry.apply {
322→                                    inspectNode.psi.replace(comma)
323→                                    add(newline)
324→                                    add(createSemicolon())
325→                                }
326→                            }
327→                            Unit
328→                        } else {
329→                            prevNode.psi.parent.addAfter(comma, prevNode.psi)
330→                        }
331→                    }
332→                }
333→            TrailingCommaState.REDUNDANT -> {
334→                emit(
335→                    trailingCommaNode!!.startOffset,
336→                    "Unnecessary trailing comma before \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
337→                    true,
338→                )
339→                if (autoCorrect) {
340→                    this.removeChild(trailingCommaNode)
341→                }
342→            }
343→            TrailingCommaState.NOT_EXISTS -> Unit
344→        }
345→    }
346→
347→    private fun ASTNode.getWhenEntryIndent() =
348→        // The when entry can be a simple value but might also be a complex expression.
349→        parents()
350→            .last { it.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY }
351→            .lineIndent()
352→
353→    private fun isMultiline(element: PsiElement): Boolean =
354→        when {
355→            element.parent is KtFunctionLiteral -> {
356→                isMultiline(element.parent)
357→            }
358→            element is KtFunctionLiteral -> {
359→                containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(element.valueParameterList!!, element.arrow!!)
360→            }
361→            element is KtWhenEntry -> {
362→                containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(element.firstChild, element.arrow!!)
363→            }
364→            element is KtDestructuringDeclaration -> {
365→                containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(element.lPar!!, element.rPar!!)
366→            }
367→            element is KtValueArgumentList &&
368→                element.children.size == 1 &&
369→                element.anyDescendantOfType<KtCollectionLiteralExpression>() -> {
370→                // special handling for collection literal
371→                // @Annotation([
372→                //    "something",
373→                // ])
374→                val lastChild = element.collectDescendantsOfType<KtCollectionLiteralExpression>().last()
375→                containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(lastChild.rightBracket!!, element.rightParenthesis!!)
376→            }
377→            element is KtParameterList && element.parameters.isEmpty() -> {
378→                false

 49→/**
 50→ * Linting trailing comma for declaration site.
 51→ *
 52→ * @see [Kotlin Style Guide](https://kotlinlang.org/docs/coding-conventions.html#trailing-commas)
 53→ */
 54→public class TrailingCommaOnDeclarationSiteRule :
 55→    StandardRule(
 56→        id = "trailing-comma-on-declaration-site",
 57→        visitorModifiers = setOf(
 58→            VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 59→                ruleId = WRAPPING_RULE_ID,
 60→                loadOnlyWhenOtherRuleIsLoaded = true,
 61→                runOnlyWhenOtherRuleIsEnabled = true,
 62→            ),
 63→            VisitorModifier.RunAsLateAsPossible,
 64→        ),
 65→    ),
 66→    UsesEditorConfigProperties {
 67→    override val editorConfigProperties: List<EditorConfigProperty<*>> = listOf(
 68→        TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_PROPERTY,
 69→    )
 70→
 71→    private var allowTrailingComma by Delegates.notNull<Boolean>()
 72→
 73→    private fun ASTNode.isTrailingCommaAllowed() = elementType in TYPES_ON_DECLARATION_SITE && allowTrailingComma
 74→
 75→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfigProperties: EditorConfigProperties) {
 76→        allowTrailingComma = editorConfigProperties.getEditorConfigValue(TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_PROPERTY)
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 80→        node: ASTNode,
 81→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 82→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 83→    ) {
 84→        // Keep processing of element types in sync with Intellij Kotlin formatting settings.
 85→        // https://github.com/JetBrains/intellij-kotlin/blob/master/formatter/src/org/jetbrains/kotlin/idea/formatter/trailingComma/util.kt
 86→        when (node.elementType) {
 87→            CLASS -> visitClass(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 88→            DESTRUCTURING_DECLARATION -> visitDestructuringDeclaration(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 89→            FUNCTION_LITERAL -> visitFunctionLiteral(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 90→            TYPE_PARAMETER_LIST -> visitTypeList(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 91→            VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST -> visitValueList(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 92→            WHEN_ENTRY -> visitWhenEntry(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 93→            else -> Unit
 94→        }
 95→    }
 96→
 97→    private fun visitDestructuringDeclaration(
 98→        node: ASTNode,
 99→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
100→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
101→    ) {
102→        val inspectNode = node
103→            .children()
104→            .last { it.elementType == ElementType.RPAR }
105→        node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
106→            inspectNode = inspectNode,
107→            isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
108→            autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
109→            emit = emit,
110→        )
111→    }
112→
113→    private fun visitFunctionLiteral(
114→        node: ASTNode,
115→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
116→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
117→    ) {
118→        val inspectNode = node
119→            .children()
120→            .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ARROW }
121→            ?: // lambda w/o an arrow -> no arguments -> no commas
122→            return
123→        node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
124→            inspectNode = inspectNode,
125→            isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
126→            autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
127→            emit = emit,
128→        )
129→    }
130→
131→    private fun visitValueList(
132→        node: ASTNode,
133→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
134→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
135→    ) {
136→        if (node.treeParent.elementType != FUNCTION_LITERAL) {
137→            node
138→                .children()
139→                .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ElementType.RPAR }
140→                ?.let { inspectNode ->
141→                    node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
142→                        inspectNode = inspectNode,
143→                        isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
144→                        autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
145→                        emit = emit,
146→                    )
147→                }
148→        }
149→    }
150→
151→    private fun visitTypeList(
152→        node: ASTNode,
153→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
154→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
155→    ) {
156→        val inspectNode = node
157→            .children()
158→            .first { it.elementType == ElementType.GT }
159→        node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
160→            inspectNode = inspectNode,
161→            isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
162→            autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
163→            emit = emit,
164→        )
165→    }
166→
167→    private fun visitWhenEntry(
168→        node: ASTNode,
169→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
170→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
171→    ) {
172→        val psi = node.psi
173→        require(psi is KtWhenEntry)
174→        if (psi.isElse || psi.parent.cast<KtWhenExpression>().leftParenthesis == null) {
175→            // no commas for "else" or when there are no opening parenthesis for the when-expression
176→            return
177→        }
178→
179→        val inspectNode = node
180→            .children()
181→            .first { it.elementType == ARROW }
182→        node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
183→            inspectNode = inspectNode,
184→            isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
185→            autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
186→            emit = emit,
187→        )
188→    }
189→    private fun visitClass(
190→        node: ASTNode,
191→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
192→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
193→    ) {
194→        val psi = node.psi
195→        require(psi is KtClass)
196→
197→        node
198→            .takeIf { psi.isEnum() }
199→            ?.findChildByType(ElementType.CLASS_BODY)
200→            ?.takeUnless {
201→                // Do nothing when last two entries are on same line as no trailing comma should be inserted
202→                it.lastTwoEnumEntriesAreOnSameLine()
203→            }?.let { classBody ->
204→                val nodeAfterTrailingCommaPosition = classBody.findNodeAfterTrailingCommaPosition()
205→                node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
206→                    inspectNode = nodeAfterTrailingCommaPosition,
207→                    isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
208→                    autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
209→                    emit = emit,
210→                )
211→            }
212→    }
213→
214→    /**
215→     * Determines the [ASTNode] before which the trailing comma is allowed.
216→     *
217→     * If the list of enumeration entries is terminated by a semicolon, that semicolon will be returned. Otherwise, the
218→     * last element of the class.
219→     */
220→    private fun ASTNode.findNodeAfterTrailingCommaPosition(): ASTNode {
221→        val lastEnumEntry = children().last { it.psi is KtEnumEntry }
222→
223→        val semicolonAfterLastEnumEntry = lastEnumEntry
224→            .children()
225→            .singleOrNull { it.elementType == ElementType.SEMICOLON }
226→
227→        return semicolonAfterLastEnumEntry ?: lastChildNode
228→    }
229→
230→    private fun ASTNode.lastTwoEnumEntriesAreOnSameLine(): Boolean {
231→        val lastTwoEnumEntries =
232→            children()
233→                .filter { it.psi is KtEnumEntry }
234→                .toList()
235→                .takeLast(2)
236→
237→        return lastTwoEnumEntries.count() == 2 && noNewLineInClosedRange(lastTwoEnumEntries[0], lastTwoEnumEntries[1])
238→    }
239→
240→    private fun ASTNode.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
241→        inspectNode: ASTNode,
242→        isTrailingCommaAllowed: Boolean,
243→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
244→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
245→    ) {
246→        val prevLeaf = inspectNode.prevLeaf()
247→        val trailingCommaNode = prevLeaf?.findPreviousTrailingCommaNodeOrNull()
248→        val trailingCommaState = when {
249→            isMultiline(psi) -> if (trailingCommaNode != null) TrailingCommaState.EXISTS else TrailingCommaState.MISSING
250→            else -> if (trailingCommaNode != null) TrailingCommaState.REDUNDANT else TrailingCommaState.NOT_EXISTS
251→        }
252→        when (trailingCommaState) {
253→            TrailingCommaState.EXISTS ->
254→                if (isTrailingCommaAllowed) {
255→                    inspectNode
256→                        .treeParent
257→                        .takeIf { it.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY }
258→                        ?.findChildByType(ARROW)
259→                        ?.prevLeaf()
260→                        ?.let { lastNodeBeforeArrow ->
261→                            if (lastNodeBeforeArrow.elementType != WHITE_SPACE || !lastNodeBeforeArrow.textContains('\n')) {
262→                                emit(
263→                                    trailingCommaNode!!.startOffset,
264→                                    "Expected a newline between the trailing comma and  \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
265→                                    true,
266→                                )
267→                                if (autoCorrect) {
268→                                    val parentIndent = "\n" + inspectNode.getWhenEntryIndent()
269→                                    lastNodeBeforeArrow.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(parentIndent)
270→                                }
271→                            }
272→                        }
273→                } else {
274→                    emit(
275→                        trailingCommaNode!!.startOffset,
276→                        "Unnecessary trailing comma before \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
277→                        true,
278→                    )
279→                    if (autoCorrect) {
280→                        this.removeChild(trailingCommaNode)
281→                    }
282→                }
283→            TrailingCommaState.MISSING ->
284→                if (isTrailingCommaAllowed) {
285→                    val addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhenEntry = addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhen()
286→                    val prevNode = inspectNode.prevCodeLeaf()!!
287→                    if (addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhenEntry) {
288→                        emit(
289→                            prevNode.startOffset + prevNode.textLength,
290→                            "Missing trailing comma and newline before \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
291→                            true,
292→                        )
293→                    } else {
294→                        emit(
295→                            prevNode.startOffset + prevNode.textLength,
296→                            "Missing trailing comma before \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
297→                            true,
298→                        )
299→                    }
300→                    if (autoCorrect) {
301→                        if (addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhenEntry) {
302→                            val parentIndent = "\n" + prevNode.getWhenEntryIndent()
303→                            val leafBeforeArrow = (psi as KtWhenEntry).arrow?.prevLeaf()
304→                            if (leafBeforeArrow != null && leafBeforeArrow is PsiWhiteSpace) {
305→                                val newLine = KtPsiFactory(prevNode.psi).createWhiteSpace(parentIndent)
306→                                leafBeforeArrow.replace(newLine)
307→                            } else {
308→                                val newLine = KtPsiFactory(prevNode.psi).createWhiteSpace(parentIndent)
309→                                prevNode.psi.parent.addAfter(newLine, prevNode.psi)
310→                            }
311→                        }
312→
313→                        val comma = KtPsiFactory(prevNode.psi).createComma()
314→                        if (inspectNode.treeParent.elementType == ElementType.ENUM_ENTRY) {
315→                            with(KtPsiFactory(prevNode.psi)) {
316→                                val parentIndent =
317→                                    (prevNode.psi.parent.prevLeaf() as? PsiWhiteSpace)?.text
318→                                        ?: "\n${prevNode.lineIndent()}"
319→                                val newline = createWhiteSpace(parentIndent)
320→                                val enumEntry = inspectNode.treeParent.psi
321→                                enumEntry.apply {
322→                                    inspectNode.psi.replace(comma)
323→                                    add(newline)
324→                                    add(createSemicolon())
325→                                }
326→                            }
327→                            Unit
328→                        } else {
329→                            prevNode.psi.parent.addAfter(comma, prevNode.psi)
330→                        }
331→                    }
332→                }
333→            TrailingCommaState.REDUNDANT -> {
334→                emit(
335→                    trailingCommaNode!!.startOffset,
336→                    "Unnecessary trailing comma before \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
337→                    true,
338→                )
339→                if (autoCorrect) {
340→                    this.removeChild(trailingCommaNode)
341→                }
342→            }
343→            TrailingCommaState.NOT_EXISTS -> Unit
344→        }
345→    }
346→
347→    private fun ASTNode.getWhenEntryIndent() =
348→        // The when entry can be a simple value but might also be a complex expression.
349→        parents()
350→            .last { it.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY }
351→            .lineIndent()
352→
353→    private fun isMultiline(element: PsiElement): Boolean =
354→        when {
355→            element.parent is KtFunctionLiteral -> {
356→                isMultiline(element.parent)
357→            }
358→            element is KtFunctionLiteral -> {
359→                containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(element.valueParameterList!!, element.arrow!!)
360→            }
361→            element is KtWhenEntry -> {
362→                containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(element.firstChild, element.arrow!!)
363→            }
364→            element is KtDestructuringDeclaration -> {
365→                containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(element.lPar!!, element.rPar!!)
366→            }
367→            element is KtValueArgumentList &&
368→                element.children.size == 1 &&
369→                element.anyDescendantOfType<KtCollectionLiteralExpression>() -> {
370→                // special handling for collection literal
371→                // @Annotation([
372→                //    "something",
373→                // ])
374→                val lastChild = element.collectDescendantsOfType<KtCollectionLiteralExpression>().last()
375→                containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(lastChild.rightBracket!!, element.rightParenthesis!!)
376→            }
377→            element is KtParameterList && element.parameters.isEmpty() -> {
378→                false
379→            }
380→            else -> {
381→                element.textContains('\n')
382→            }
383→        }
384→
385→    private fun ASTNode.addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhen() =
386→        if (psi is KtWhenEntry) {
387→            val leafBeforeArrow = (psi as KtWhenEntry).arrow?.prevLeaf()
388→            !(leafBeforeArrow is PsiWhiteSpace && leafBeforeArrow.textContains('\n'))
389→        } else {
390→            false
391→        }
392→
393→    private fun ASTNode.findPreviousTrailingCommaNodeOrNull(): ASTNode? {
394→        val codeLeaf = if (isCodeLeaf()) {
395→            this
396→        } else {
397→            prevCodeLeaf()
398→        }
399→        return codeLeaf?.takeIf { it.elementType == ElementType.COMMA }
400→    }
401→
402→    private fun containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(
403→        from: PsiElement,
404→        to: PsiElement,
405→    ): Boolean {
406→        var leaf: PsiElement? = from
407→        while (leaf != null && !leaf.isEquivalentTo(to)) {
408→            if (leaf.textContains('\n')) {
409→                return true
410→            }
411→            leaf = leaf.nextLeaf(skipEmptyElements = false)
412→        }
413→        return leaf?.textContains('\n') ?: false
414→    }
415→
416→    private enum class TrailingCommaState {
417→        /**
418→         * The trailing comma is needed and exists
419→         */
420→        EXISTS,
421→
422→        /**
423→         * The trailing comma is needed and doesn't exist
424→         */
425→        MISSING,
426→
427→        /**
428→         * The trailing comma isn't needed and doesn't exist
429→         */
430→        NOT_EXISTS,
431→
432→        /**
433→         * The trailing comma isn't needed, but exists
434→         */
435→        REDUNDANT,
436→    }
437→
438→    public companion object {
439→        private val BOOLEAN_VALUES_SET = setOf("true", "false")
440→
441→        public val TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_PROPERTY: EditorConfigProperty<Boolean> =
442→            EditorConfigProperty(
443→                type = PropertyType.LowerCasingPropertyType(
444→                    "ij_kotlin_allow_trailing_comma",
445→                    "Defines whether a trailing comma (or no trailing comma) should be enforced on the defining " +
446→                        "side, e.g. parameter-list, type-argument-list, lambda-value-parameters, enum-entries, etc." +
447→                        "When set, IntelliJ IDEA uses this property to allow usage of a trailing comma by discretion " +
448→                        "of the developer. KtLint however uses this setting to enforce consistent usage of the " +
449→                        "trailing comma when set.",
450→                    PropertyValueParser.BOOLEAN_VALUE_PARSER,
451→                    BOOLEAN_VALUES_SET,
452→                ),
453→                defaultValue = true,
454→                androidStudioCodeStyleDefaultValue = false,
455→            )
456→
457→        @Deprecated(
458→            message = "Marked for removal in KtLint 0.49",
459→            replaceWith = ReplaceWith("TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_PROPERTY"),
460→        )
461→        @Suppress("ktlint:property-naming")
462→        public val allowTrailingCommaProperty: EditorConfigProperty<Boolean> =
463→            TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_PROPERTY
464→
465→        private val TYPES_ON_DECLARATION_SITE = TokenSet.create(
466→            CLASS,
467→            DESTRUCTURING_DECLARATION,
468→            FUNCTION_LITERAL,
469→            FUNCTION_TYPE,
470→            TYPE_PARAMETER_LIST,
471→            VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST,
472→            WHEN_ENTRY,
473→        )
474→    }
475→}
476→
477→public val TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_RULE_ID: RuleId = TrailingCommaOnDeclarationSiteRule().ruleId

 48→
 49→/**
 50→ * Linting trailing comma for declaration site.
 51→ *
 52→ * @see [Kotlin Style Guide](https://kotlinlang.org/docs/coding-conventions.html#trailing-commas)
 53→ */
 54→public class TrailingCommaOnDeclarationSiteRule :
 55→    StandardRule(
 56→        id = "trailing-comma-on-declaration-site",
 57→        visitorModifiers = setOf(
 58→            VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 59→                ruleId = WRAPPING_RULE_ID,
 60→                loadOnlyWhenOtherRuleIsLoaded = true,
 61→                runOnlyWhenOtherRuleIsEnabled = true,
 62→            ),
 63→            VisitorModifier.RunAsLateAsPossible,
 64→        ),
 65→    ),
 66→    UsesEditorConfigProperties {
 67→    override val editorConfigProperties: List<EditorConfigProperty<*>> = listOf(
 68→        TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_PROPERTY,
 69→    )
 70→
 71→    private var allowTrailingComma by Delegates.notNull<Boolean>()
 72→
 73→    private fun ASTNode.isTrailingCommaAllowed() = elementType in TYPES_ON_DECLARATION_SITE && allowTrailingComma
 74→
 75→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfigProperties: EditorConfigProperties) {
 76→        allowTrailingComma = editorConfigProperties.getEditorConfigValue(TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_PROPERTY)
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 80→        node: ASTNode,
 81→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 82→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 83→    ) {
 84→        // Keep processing of element types in sync with Intellij Kotlin formatting settings.
 85→        // https://github.com/JetBrains/intellij-kotlin/blob/master/formatter/src/org/jetbrains/kotlin/idea/formatter/trailingComma/util.kt
 86→        when (node.elementType) {
 87→            CLASS -> visitClass(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 88→            DESTRUCTURING_DECLARATION -> visitDestructuringDeclaration(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 89→            FUNCTION_LITERAL -> visitFunctionLiteral(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 90→            TYPE_PARAMETER_LIST -> visitTypeList(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 91→            VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST -> visitValueList(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 92→            WHEN_ENTRY -> visitWhenEntry(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 93→            else -> Unit
 94→        }
 95→    }
 96→
 97→    private fun visitDestructuringDeclaration(
 98→        node: ASTNode,
 99→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
100→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
101→    ) {
102→        val inspectNode = node
103→            .children()
104→            .last { it.elementType == ElementType.RPAR }
105→        node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
106→            inspectNode = inspectNode,
107→            isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
108→            autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
109→            emit = emit,
110→        )
111→    }
112→
113→    private fun visitFunctionLiteral(
114→        node: ASTNode,
115→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
116→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
117→    ) {
118→        val inspectNode = node
119→            .children()
120→            .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ARROW }
121→            ?: // lambda w/o an arrow -> no arguments -> no commas
122→            return
123→        node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
124→            inspectNode = inspectNode,
125→            isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
126→            autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
127→            emit = emit,
128→        )
129→    }
130→
131→    private fun visitValueList(
132→        node: ASTNode,
133→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
134→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
135→    ) {
136→        if (node.treeParent.elementType != FUNCTION_LITERAL) {
137→            node
138→                .children()
139→                .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ElementType.RPAR }
140→                ?.let { inspectNode ->
141→                    node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
142→                        inspectNode = inspectNode,
143→                        isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
144→                        autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
145→                        emit = emit,
146→                    )
147→                }
148→        }
149→    }
150→
151→    private fun visitTypeList(
152→        node: ASTNode,
153→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
154→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
155→    ) {
156→        val inspectNode = node
157→            .children()
158→            .first { it.elementType == ElementType.GT }
159→        node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
160→            inspectNode = inspectNode,
161→            isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
162→            autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
163→            emit = emit,
164→        )
165→    }
166→
167→    private fun visitWhenEntry(
168→        node: ASTNode,
169→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
170→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
171→    ) {
172→        val psi = node.psi
173→        require(psi is KtWhenEntry)
174→        if (psi.isElse || psi.parent.cast<KtWhenExpression>().leftParenthesis == null) {
175→            // no commas for "else" or when there are no opening parenthesis for the when-expression
176→            return
177→        }
178→
179→        val inspectNode = node
180→            .children()
181→            .first { it.elementType == ARROW }
182→        node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
183→            inspectNode = inspectNode,
184→            isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
185→            autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
186→            emit = emit,
187→        )
188→    }
189→    private fun visitClass(
190→        node: ASTNode,
191→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
192→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
193→    ) {
194→        val psi = node.psi
195→        require(psi is KtClass)
196→
197→        node
198→            .takeIf { psi.isEnum() }
199→            ?.findChildByType(ElementType.CLASS_BODY)
200→            ?.takeIf { classBody ->
201→                classBody.children().any { it.psi is KtEnumEntry }
202→            }
203→            ?.takeUnless {
204→                // Do nothing when last two entries are on same line as no trailing comma should be inserted
205→                it.lastTwoEnumEntriesAreOnSameLine()
206→            }?.let { classBody ->
207→                val nodeAfterTrailingCommaPosition = classBody.findNodeAfterTrailingCommaPosition()
208→                node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
209→                    inspectNode = nodeAfterTrailingCommaPosition,
210→                    isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
211→                    autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
212→                    emit = emit,
213→                )
214→            }
215→    }
216→
217→    /**
218→     * Determines the [ASTNode] before which the trailing comma is allowed.
219→     *
220→     * If the list of enumeration entries is terminated by a semicolon, that semicolon will be returned. Otherwise, the
221→     * last element of the class.
222→     */
223→    private fun ASTNode.findNodeAfterTrailingCommaPosition(): ASTNode {
224→        val lastEnumEntry = children().last { it.psi is KtEnumEntry }
225→
226→        val semicolonAfterLastEnumEntry = lastEnumEntry
227→            .children()
228→            .singleOrNull { it.elementType == ElementType.SEMICOLON }
229→
230→        return semicolonAfterLastEnumEntry ?: lastChildNode
231→    }
232→
233→    private fun ASTNode.lastTwoEnumEntriesAreOnSameLine(): Boolean {
234→        val lastTwoEnumEntries =
235→            children()
236→                .filter { it.psi is KtEnumEntry }
237→                .toList()
238→                .takeLast(2)
239→
240→        return lastTwoEnumEntries.count() == 2 && noNewLineInClosedRange(lastTwoEnumEntries[0], lastTwoEnumEntries[1])
241→    }
242→
243→    private fun ASTNode.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
244→        inspectNode: ASTNode,
245→        isTrailingCommaAllowed: Boolean,
246→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
247→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
248→    ) {
249→        val prevLeaf = inspectNode.prevLeaf()
250→        val trailingCommaNode = prevLeaf?.findPreviousTrailingCommaNodeOrNull()
251→        val trailingCommaState = when {
252→            isMultiline(psi) -> if (trailingCommaNode != null) TrailingCommaState.EXISTS else TrailingCommaState.MISSING
253→            else -> if (trailingCommaNode != null) TrailingCommaState.REDUNDANT else TrailingCommaState.NOT_EXISTS
254→        }
255→        when (trailingCommaState) {
256→            TrailingCommaState.EXISTS ->
257→                if (isTrailingCommaAllowed) {
258→                    inspectNode
259→                        .treeParent
260→                        .takeIf { it.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY }
261→                        ?.findChildByType(ARROW)
262→                        ?.prevLeaf()
263→                        ?.let { lastNodeBeforeArrow ->
264→                            if (lastNodeBeforeArrow.elementType != WHITE_SPACE || !lastNodeBeforeArrow.textContains('\n')) {
265→                                emit(
266→                                    trailingCommaNode!!.startOffset,
267→                                    "Expected a newline between the trailing comma and  \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
268→                                    true,
269→                                )
270→                                if (autoCorrect) {
271→                                    val parentIndent = "\n" + inspectNode.getWhenEntryIndent()
272→                                    lastNodeBeforeArrow.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(parentIndent)
273→                                }
274→                            }
275→                        }
276→                } else {
277→                    emit(
278→                        trailingCommaNode!!.startOffset,
279→                        "Unnecessary trailing comma before \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
280→                        true,
281→                    )
282→                    if (autoCorrect) {
283→                        this.removeChild(trailingCommaNode)
284→                    }
285→                }
286→            TrailingCommaState.MISSING ->
287→                if (isTrailingCommaAllowed) {
288→                    val addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhenEntry = addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhen()
289→                    val prevNode = inspectNode.prevCodeLeaf()!!
290→                    if (addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhenEntry) {
291→                        emit(
292→                            prevNode.startOffset + prevNode.textLength,
293→                            "Missing trailing comma and newline before \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
294→                            true,
295→                        )
296→                    } else {
297→                        emit(
298→                            prevNode.startOffset + prevNode.textLength,
299→                            "Missing trailing comma before \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
300→                            true,
301→                        )
302→                    }
303→                    if (autoCorrect) {
304→                        if (addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhenEntry) {
305→                            val parentIndent = "\n" + prevNode.getWhenEntryIndent()
306→                            val leafBeforeArrow = (psi as KtWhenEntry).arrow?.prevLeaf()
307→                            if (leafBeforeArrow != null && leafBeforeArrow is PsiWhiteSpace) {
308→                                val newLine = KtPsiFactory(prevNode.psi).createWhiteSpace(parentIndent)
309→                                leafBeforeArrow.replace(newLine)
310→                            } else {
311→                                val newLine = KtPsiFactory(prevNode.psi).createWhiteSpace(parentIndent)
312→                                prevNode.psi.parent.addAfter(newLine, prevNode.psi)
313→                            }
314→                        }
315→
316→                        val comma = KtPsiFactory(prevNode.psi).createComma()
317→                        if (inspectNode.treeParent.elementType == ElementType.ENUM_ENTRY) {
318→                            with(KtPsiFactory(prevNode.psi)) {
319→                                val parentIndent =
320→                                    (prevNode.psi.parent.prevLeaf() as? PsiWhiteSpace)?.text
321→                                        ?: "\n${prevNode.lineIndent()}"
322→                                val newline = createWhiteSpace(parentIndent)
323→                                val enumEntry = inspectNode.treeParent.psi
324→                                enumEntry.apply {
325→                                    inspectNode.psi.replace(comma)
326→                                    add(newline)
327→                                    add(createSemicolon())
328→                                }
329→                            }
330→                            Unit
331→                        } else {
332→                            prevNode.psi.parent.addAfter(comma, prevNode.psi)
333→                        }
334→                    }
335→                }
336→            TrailingCommaState.REDUNDANT -> {
337→                emit(
338→                    trailingCommaNode!!.startOffset,
339→                    "Unnecessary trailing comma before \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
340→                    true,
341→                )
342→                if (autoCorrect) {
343→                    this.removeChild(trailingCommaNode)
344→                }
345→            }
346→            TrailingCommaState.NOT_EXISTS -> Unit
347→        }
348→    }
349→
350→    private fun ASTNode.getWhenEntryIndent() =
351→        // The when entry can be a simple value but might also be a complex expression.
352→        parents()
353→            .last { it.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY }
354→            .lineIndent()
355→
356→    private fun isMultiline(element: PsiElement): Boolean =
357→        when {
358→            element.parent is KtFunctionLiteral -> {
359→                isMultiline(element.parent)
360→            }
361→            element is KtFunctionLiteral -> {
362→                containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(element.valueParameterList!!, element.arrow!!)
363→            }
364→            element is KtWhenEntry -> {
365→                containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(element.firstChild, element.arrow!!)
366→            }
367→            element is KtDestructuringDeclaration -> {
368→                containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(element.lPar!!, element.rPar!!)
369→            }
370→            element is KtValueArgumentList &&
371→                element.children.size == 1 &&
372→                element.anyDescendantOfType<KtCollectionLiteralExpression>() -> {
373→                // special handling for collection literal
374→                // @Annotation([
375→                //    "something",
376→                // ])
377→                val lastChild = element.collectDescendantsOfType<KtCollectionLiteralExpression>().last()
378→                containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(lastChild.rightBracket!!, element.rightParenthesis!!)
379→            }
380→            element is KtParameterList && element.parameters.isEmpty() -> {
381→                false
382→            }
383→            else -> {
384→                element.textContains('\n')
385→            }
386→        }
387→
388→    private fun ASTNode.addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhen() =
389→        if (psi is KtWhenEntry) {
390→            val leafBeforeArrow = (psi as KtWhenEntry).arrow?.prevLeaf()
391→            !(leafBeforeArrow is PsiWhiteSpace && leafBeforeArrow.textContains('\n'))
392→        } else {
393→            false
394→        }
395→
396→    private fun ASTNode.findPreviousTrailingCommaNodeOrNull(): ASTNode? {
397→        val codeLeaf = if (isCodeLeaf()) {
398→            this
399→        } else {
400→            prevCodeLeaf()
401→        }
402→        return codeLeaf?.takeIf { it.elementType == ElementType.COMMA }
403→    }
404→
405→    private fun containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(
406→        from: PsiElement,
407→        to: PsiElement,
408→    ): Boolean {
409→        var leaf: PsiElement? = from
410→        while (leaf != null && !leaf.isEquivalentTo(to)) {
411→            if (leaf.textContains('\n')) {
412→                return true
413→            }
414→            leaf = leaf.nextLeaf(skipEmptyElements = false)
415→        }
416→        return leaf?.textContains('\n') ?: false
417→    }
418→
419→    private enum class TrailingCommaState {
420→        /**
421→         * The trailing comma is needed and exists
422→         */
423→        EXISTS,
424→
425→        /**
426→         * The trailing comma is needed and doesn't exist
427→         */
428→        MISSING,
429→
430→        /**
431→         * The trailing comma isn't needed and doesn't exist
432→         */
433→        NOT_EXISTS,
434→
435→        /**
436→         * The trailing comma isn't needed, but exists
437→         */
438→        REDUNDANT,
439→    }
440→
441→    public companion object {
442→        private val BOOLEAN_VALUES_SET = setOf("true", "false")
443→
444→        public val TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_PROPERTY: EditorConfigProperty<Boolean> =
445→            EditorConfigProperty(
446→                type = PropertyType.LowerCasingPropertyType(
447→                    "ij_kotlin_allow_trailing_comma",
448→                    "Defines whether a trailing comma (or no trailing comma) should be enforced on the defining " +
449→                        "side, e.g. parameter-list, type-argument-list, lambda-value-parameters, enum-entries, etc." +
450→                        "When set, IntelliJ IDEA uses this property to allow usage of a trailing comma by discretion " +
451→                        "of the developer. KtLint however uses this setting to enforce consistent usage of the " +
452→                        "trailing comma when set.",
453→                    PropertyValueParser.BOOLEAN_VALUE_PARSER,
454→                    BOOLEAN_VALUES_SET,
455→                ),
456→                defaultValue = true,
457→                androidStudioCodeStyleDefaultValue = false,
458→            )
459→
460→        @Deprecated(
461→            message = "Marked for removal in KtLint 0.49",
462→            replaceWith = ReplaceWith("TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_PROPERTY"),
463→        )
464→        @Suppress("ktlint:property-naming")
465→        public val allowTrailingCommaProperty: EditorConfigProperty<Boolean> =
466→            TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_PROPERTY
467→
468→        private val TYPES_ON_DECLARATION_SITE = TokenSet.create(
469→            CLASS,
470→            DESTRUCTURING_DECLARATION,
471→            FUNCTION_LITERAL,
472→            FUNCTION_TYPE,
473→            TYPE_PARAMETER_LIST,
474→            VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST,
475→            WHEN_ENTRY,
476→        )
477→    }
478→}
479→

 51→ *
 52→ * @see [Kotlin Style Guide](https://kotlinlang.org/docs/coding-conventions.html#trailing-commas)

 54→public class TrailingCommaOnDeclarationSiteRule :
 55→    StandardRule(
 56→        id = "trailing-comma-on-declaration-site",
 57→        visitorModifiers = setOf(
 58→            VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 59→                ruleId = WRAPPING_RULE_ID,
 60→                loadOnlyWhenOtherRuleIsLoaded = true,
 61→                runOnlyWhenOtherRuleIsEnabled = true,
 62→            ),
 63→            VisitorModifier.RunAsLateAsPossible,
 64→        ),
 65→    ),
 66→    UsesEditorConfigProperties {
 67→    override val editorConfigProperties: List<EditorConfigProperty<*>> = listOf(
 68→        TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_PROPERTY,
 69→    )
 70→
 71→    private var allowTrailingComma by Delegates.notNull<Boolean>()
 72→
 73→    private fun ASTNode.isTrailingCommaAllowed() = elementType in TYPES_ON_DECLARATION_SITE && allowTrailingComma
 74→
 75→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfigProperties: EditorConfigProperties) {
 76→        allowTrailingComma = editorConfigProperties.getEditorConfigValue(TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_PROPERTY)
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 80→        node: ASTNode,
 81→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 82→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 83→    ) {
 84→        // Keep processing of element types in sync with Intellij Kotlin formatting settings.
 85→        // https://github.com/JetBrains/intellij-kotlin/blob/master/formatter/src/org/jetbrains/kotlin/idea/formatter/trailingComma/util.kt
 86→        when (node.elementType) {
 87→            CLASS -> visitClass(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 88→            DESTRUCTURING_DECLARATION -> visitDestructuringDeclaration(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 89→            FUNCTION_LITERAL -> visitFunctionLiteral(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 90→            TYPE_PARAMETER_LIST -> visitTypeList(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 91→            VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST -> visitValueList(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 92→            WHEN_ENTRY -> visitWhenEntry(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 93→            else -> Unit
 94→        }
 95→    }
 96→
 97→    private fun visitDestructuringDeclaration(
 98→        node: ASTNode,
 99→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
100→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
101→    ) {
102→        val inspectNode = node
103→            .children()
104→            .last { it.elementType == ElementType.RPAR }
105→        node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
106→            inspectNode = inspectNode,
107→            isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
108→            autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
109→            emit = emit,
110→        )
111→    }

113→    private fun visitFunctionLiteral(
114→        node: ASTNode,
115→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
116→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
117→    ) {
118→        val inspectNode = node
119→            .children()
120→            .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ARROW }
121→            ?: // lambda w/o an arrow -> no arguments -> no commas
122→            return
123→        node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
124→            inspectNode = inspectNode,
125→            isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
126→            autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
127→            emit = emit,

131→    private fun visitValueList(
132→        node: ASTNode,
133→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
134→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
135→    ) {
136→        if (node.treeParent.elementType != FUNCTION_LITERAL) {
137→            node
138→                .children()
139→                .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ElementType.RPAR }
140→                ?.let { inspectNode ->
141→                    node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
142→                        inspectNode = inspectNode,
143→                        isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
144→                        autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
145→                        emit = emit,

152→        node: ASTNode,

155→    ) {
156→        val inspectNode = node
157→            .children()
158→            .first { it.elementType == ElementType.GT }

160→            inspectNode = inspectNode,
161→            isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),

167→    private fun visitWhenEntry(
168→        node: ASTNode,

183→            inspectNode = inspectNode,

189→    private fun visitClass(
190→        node: ASTNode,
191→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,

218→     * last element of the class.

220→    private fun ASTNode.findNodeAfterTrailingCommaPosition(): ASTNode {
221→        val lastEnumEntry = children().last { it.psi is KtEnumEntry }
222→
223→        val semicolonAfterLastEnumEntry = lastEnumEntry
224→            .children()
225→            .singleOrNull { it.elementType == ElementType.SEMICOLON }

230→    private fun ASTNode.lastTwoEnumEntriesAreOnSameLine(): Boolean {
231→        val lastTwoEnumEntries =
232→            children()
233→                .filter { it.psi is KtEnumEntry }
234→                .toList()
235→                .takeLast(2)
236→
237→        return lastTwoEnumEntries.count() == 2 && noNewLineInClosedRange(lastTwoEnumEntries[0], lastTwoEnumEntries[1])
238→    }

240→    private fun ASTNode.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
241→        inspectNode: ASTNode,
242→        isTrailingCommaAllowed: Boolean,
243→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
244→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
245→    ) {
246→        val prevLeaf = inspectNode.prevLeaf()
247→        val trailingCommaNode = prevLeaf?.findPreviousTrailingCommaNodeOrNull()
248→        val trailingCommaState = when {
249→            isMultiline(psi) -> if (trailingCommaNode != null) TrailingCommaState.EXISTS else TrailingCommaState.MISSING
250→            else -> if (trailingCommaNode != null) TrailingCommaState.REDUNDANT else TrailingCommaState.NOT_EXISTS
251→        }
252→        when (trailingCommaState) {
253→            TrailingCommaState.EXISTS ->
254→                if (isTrailingCommaAllowed) {
255→                    inspectNode
256→                        .treeParent
257→                        .takeIf { it.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY }
258→                        ?.findChildByType(ARROW)
259→                        ?.prevLeaf()
260→                        ?.let { lastNodeBeforeArrow ->
261→                            if (lastNodeBeforeArrow.elementType != WHITE_SPACE || !lastNodeBeforeArrow.textContains('\n')) {
262→                                emit(
263→                                    trailingCommaNode!!.startOffset,
264→                                    "Expected a newline between the trailing comma and  \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
265→                                    true,
266→                                )
267→                                if (autoCorrect) {
268→                                    val parentIndent = "\n" + inspectNode.getWhenEntryIndent()
269→                                    lastNodeBeforeArrow.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(parentIndent)
270→                                }
271→                            }
272→                        }
273→                } else {
274→                    emit(
275→                        trailingCommaNode!!.startOffset,
276→                        "Unnecessary trailing comma before \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
277→                        true,
278→                    )
279→                    if (autoCorrect) {
280→                        this.removeChild(trailingCommaNode)
281→                    }
282→                }
283→            TrailingCommaState.MISSING ->
284→                if (isTrailingCommaAllowed) {
285→                    val addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhenEntry = addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhen()
286→                    val prevNode = inspectNode.prevCodeLeaf()!!
287→                    if (addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhenEntry) {
288→                        emit(
289→                            prevNode.startOffset + prevNode.textLength,
290→                            "Missing trailing comma and newline before \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
291→                            true,
292→                        )
293→                    } else {
294→                        emit(
295→                            prevNode.startOffset + prevNode.textLength,
296→                            "Missing trailing comma before \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
297→                            true,
298→                        )
299→                    }
300→                    if (autoCorrect) {
301→                        if (addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhenEntry) {
302→                            val parentIndent = "\n" + prevNode.getWhenEntryIndent()
303→                            val leafBeforeArrow = (psi as KtWhenEntry).arrow?.prevLeaf()
304→                            if (leafBeforeArrow != null && leafBeforeArrow is PsiWhiteSpace) {
305→                                val newLine = KtPsiFactory(prevNode.psi).createWhiteSpace(parentIndent)
306→                                leafBeforeArrow.replace(newLine)
307→                            } else {
308→                                val newLine = KtPsiFactory(prevNode.psi).createWhiteSpace(parentIndent)
309→                                prevNode.psi.parent.addAfter(newLine, prevNode.psi)
310→                            }
311→                        }
312→
313→                        val comma = KtPsiFactory(prevNode.psi).createComma()
314→                        if (inspectNode.treeParent.elementType == ElementType.ENUM_ENTRY) {
315→                            with(KtPsiFactory(prevNode.psi)) {
316→                                val parentIndent =
317→                                    (prevNode.psi.parent.prevLeaf() as? PsiWhiteSpace)?.text
318→                                        ?: "\n${prevNode.lineIndent()}"
319→                                val newline = createWhiteSpace(parentIndent)
320→                                val enumEntry = inspectNode.treeParent.psi
321→                                enumEntry.apply {
322→                                    inspectNode.psi.replace(comma)
323→                                    add(newline)
324→                                    add(createSemicolon())
325→                                }
326→                            }
327→                            Unit
328→                        } else {
329→                            prevNode.psi.parent.addAfter(comma, prevNode.psi)
330→                        }
331→                    }
332→                }
333→            TrailingCommaState.REDUNDANT -> {
334→                emit(
335→                    trailingCommaNode!!.startOffset,
336→                    "Unnecessary trailing comma before \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
337→                    true,
338→                )
339→                if (autoCorrect) {
340→                    this.removeChild(trailingCommaNode)
341→                }
342→            }
343→            TrailingCommaState.NOT_EXISTS -> Unit
344→        }
345→    }

347→    private fun ASTNode.getWhenEntryIndent() =
348→        // The when entry can be a simple value but might also be a complex expression.
349→        parents()
350→            .last { it.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY }
351→            .lineIndent()
352→
353→    private fun isMultiline(element: PsiElement): Boolean =
354→        when {
355→            element.parent is KtFunctionLiteral -> {
356→                isMultiline(element.parent)
357→            }
358→            element is KtFunctionLiteral -> {
359→                containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(element.valueParameterList!!, element.arrow!!)
360→            }
361→            element is KtWhenEntry -> {
362→                containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(element.firstChild, element.arrow!!)
363→            }
364→            element is KtDestructuringDeclaration -> {
365→                containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(element.lPar!!, element.rPar!!)
366→            }
367→            element is KtValueArgumentList &&
368→                element.children.size == 1 &&
369→                element.anyDescendantOfType<KtCollectionLiteralExpression>() -> {
370→                // special handling for collection literal
371→                // @Annotation([
372→                //    "something",
373→                // ])
374→                val lastChild = element.collectDescendantsOfType<KtCollectionLiteralExpression>().last()
375→                containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(lastChild.rightBracket!!, element.rightParenthesis!!)
376→            }
377→            element is KtParameterList && element.parameters.isEmpty() -> {
378→                false
379→            }
380→            else -> {
381→                element.textContains('\n')
382→            }
383→        }
384→
385→    private fun ASTNode.addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhen() =
386→        if (psi is KtWhenEntry) {
387→            val leafBeforeArrow = (psi as KtWhenEntry).arrow?.prevLeaf()
388→            !(leafBeforeArrow is PsiWhiteSpace && leafBeforeArrow.textContains('\n'))
389→        } else {
390→            false
391→        }
392→
393→    private fun ASTNode.findPreviousTrailingCommaNodeOrNull(): ASTNode? {
394→        val codeLeaf = if (isCodeLeaf()) {
395→            this
396→        } else {
397→            prevCodeLeaf()
398→        }
399→        return codeLeaf?.takeIf { it.elementType == ElementType.COMMA }
400→    }
401→
402→    private fun containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(
403→        from: PsiElement,
404→        to: PsiElement,
405→    ): Boolean {
406→        var leaf: PsiElement? = from
407→        while (leaf != null && !leaf.isEquivalentTo(to)) {
408→            if (leaf.textContains('\n')) {
409→                return true
410→            }
411→            leaf = leaf.nextLeaf(skipEmptyElements = false)
412→        }
413→        return leaf?.textContains('\n') ?: false
414→    }

416→    private enum class TrailingCommaState {
417→        /**
418→         * The trailing comma is needed and exists
419→         */
420→        EXISTS,
421→
422→        /**
423→         * The trailing comma is needed and doesn't exist
424→         */
425→        MISSING,
426→
427→        /**
428→         * The trailing comma isn't needed and doesn't exist
429→         */
430→        NOT_EXISTS,
431→
432→        /**
433→         * The trailing comma isn't needed, but exists
434→         */
435→        REDUNDANT,
436→    }

 49→/**
 50→ * Linting trailing comma for declaration site.
 51→ *
 52→ * @see [Kotlin Style Guide](https://kotlinlang.org/docs/coding-conventions.html#trailing-commas)
 53→ */
 54→public class TrailingCommaOnDeclarationSiteRule :
 55→    StandardRule(
 56→        id = "trailing-comma-on-declaration-site",
 57→        visitorModifiers = setOf(
 58→            VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 59→                ruleId = WRAPPING_RULE_ID,
 60→                loadOnlyWhenOtherRuleIsLoaded = true,
 61→                runOnlyWhenOtherRuleIsEnabled = true,
 62→            ),
 63→            VisitorModifier.RunAsLateAsPossible,
 64→        ),
 65→    ),
 66→    UsesEditorConfigProperties {
 67→    override val editorConfigProperties: List<EditorConfigProperty<*>> = listOf(
 68→        TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_PROPERTY,
 69→    )
 70→
 71→    private var allowTrailingComma by Delegates.notNull<Boolean>()
 72→
 73→    private fun ASTNode.isTrailingCommaAllowed() = elementType in TYPES_ON_DECLARATION_SITE && allowTrailingComma
 74→
 75→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfigProperties: EditorConfigProperties) {
 76→        allowTrailingComma = editorConfigProperties.getEditorConfigValue(TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_PROPERTY)
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 80→        node: ASTNode,
 81→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 82→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 83→    ) {
 84→        // Keep processing of element types in sync with Intellij Kotlin formatting settings.
 85→        // https://github.com/JetBrains/intellij-kotlin/blob/master/formatter/src/org/jetbrains/kotlin/idea/formatter/trailingComma/util.kt
 86→        when (node.elementType) {
 87→            CLASS -> visitClass(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 88→            DESTRUCTURING_DECLARATION -> visitDestructuringDeclaration(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 89→            FUNCTION_LITERAL -> visitFunctionLiteral(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 90→            TYPE_PARAMETER_LIST -> visitTypeList(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 91→            VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST -> visitValueList(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 92→            WHEN_ENTRY -> visitWhenEntry(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 93→            else -> Unit
 94→        }
 95→    }

 97→    private fun visitDestructuringDeclaration(
 98→        node: ASTNode,
 99→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
100→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
101→    ) {
102→        val inspectNode = node
103→            .children()
104→            .last { it.elementType == ElementType.RPAR }
105→        node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
106→            inspectNode = inspectNode,
107→            isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
108→            autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
109→            emit = emit,
110→        )
111→    }

113→    private fun visitFunctionLiteral(
114→        node: ASTNode,
115→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
116→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
117→    ) {
118→        val inspectNode = node
119→            .children()
120→            .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ARROW }
121→            ?: // lambda w/o an arrow -> no arguments -> no commas
122→            return
123→        node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
124→            inspectNode = inspectNode,
125→            isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),

189→    private fun visitClass(
190→        node: ASTNode,
191→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
192→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
193→    ) {
194→        val psi = node.psi
195→        require(psi is KtClass)
196→
197→        node
198→            .takeIf { psi.isEnum() }
199→            ?.findChildByType(ElementType.CLASS_BODY)
200→            ?.takeUnless {
201→                // Do nothing when last two entries are on same line as no trailing comma should be inserted
202→                it.lastTwoEnumEntriesAreOnSameLine()
203→            }?.let { classBody ->
204→                val nodeAfterTrailingCommaPosition = classBody.findNodeAfterTrailingCommaPosition()
205→                node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
206→                    inspectNode = nodeAfterTrailingCommaPosition,
207→                    isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
208→                    autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
209→                    emit = emit,
210→                )
211→            }

214→    /**
215→     * Determines the [ASTNode] before which the trailing comma is allowed.
216→     *
217→     * If the list of enumeration entries is terminated by a semicolon, that semicolon will be returned. Otherwise, the
218→     * last element of the class.
219→     */
220→    private fun ASTNode.findNodeAfterTrailingCommaPosition(): ASTNode {
221→        val lastEnumEntry = children().last { it.psi is KtEnumEntry }
222→
223→        val semicolonAfterLastEnumEntry = lastEnumEntry
224→            .children()
225→            .singleOrNull { it.elementType == ElementType.SEMICOLON }
226→
227→        return semicolonAfterLastEnumEntry ?: lastChildNode
228→    }

230→    private fun ASTNode.lastTwoEnumEntriesAreOnSameLine(): Boolean {
231→        val lastTwoEnumEntries =
232→            children()
233→                .filter { it.psi is KtEnumEntry }
234→                .toList()
235→                .takeLast(2)
236→
237→        return lastTwoEnumEntries.count() == 2 && noNewLineInClosedRange(lastTwoEnumEntries[0], lastTwoEnumEntries[1])
