206→            }?.let { classBody ->
207→                val nodeAfterTrailingCommaPosition = classBody.findNodeAfterTrailingCommaPosition()
208→                node.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
209→                    inspectNode = nodeAfterTrailingCommaPosition,
210→                    isTrailingCommaAllowed = node.isTrailingCommaAllowed(),
211→                    autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
212→                    emit = emit,
213→                )
214→            }
215→    }
216→
217→    /**
218→     * Determines the [ASTNode] before which the trailing comma is allowed.
219→     *
220→     * If the list of enumeration entries is terminated by a semicolon, that semicolon will be returned. Otherwise, the
221→     * last element of the class.
222→     */
223→    private fun ASTNode.findNodeAfterTrailingCommaPosition(): ASTNode {
224→        val lastEnumEntry = children().last { it.psi is KtEnumEntry }
225→
226→        val semicolonAfterLastEnumEntry = lastEnumEntry
227→            .children()
228→            .singleOrNull { it.elementType == ElementType.SEMICOLON }
229→
230→        return semicolonAfterLastEnumEntry ?: lastChildNode
231→    }
232→
233→    private fun ASTNode.lastTwoEnumEntriesAreOnSameLine(): Boolean {
234→        val lastTwoEnumEntries =
235→            children()
236→                .filter { it.psi is KtEnumEntry }
237→                .toList()
238→                .takeLast(2)
239→
240→        return lastTwoEnumEntries.count() == 2 && noNewLineInClosedRange(lastTwoEnumEntries[0], lastTwoEnumEntries[1])
241→    }
242→
243→    private fun ASTNode.reportAndCorrectTrailingCommaNodeBefore(
244→        inspectNode: ASTNode,
245→        isTrailingCommaAllowed: Boolean,
246→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
247→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
248→    ) {
249→        val prevLeaf = inspectNode.prevLeaf()
250→        val trailingCommaNode = prevLeaf?.findPreviousTrailingCommaNodeOrNull()
251→        val trailingCommaState = when {
252→            isMultiline(psi) -> if (trailingCommaNode != null) TrailingCommaState.EXISTS else TrailingCommaState.MISSING
253→            else -> if (trailingCommaNode != null) TrailingCommaState.REDUNDANT else TrailingCommaState.NOT_EXISTS
254→        }
255→        when (trailingCommaState) {
256→            TrailingCommaState.EXISTS ->
257→                if (isTrailingCommaAllowed) {
258→                    inspectNode
259→                        .treeParent
260→                        .takeIf { it.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY }
261→                        ?.findChildByType(ARROW)
262→                        ?.prevLeaf()
263→                        ?.let { lastNodeBeforeArrow ->
264→                            if (lastNodeBeforeArrow.elementType != WHITE_SPACE || !lastNodeBeforeArrow.textContains('\n')) {
265→                                emit(
266→                                    trailingCommaNode!!.startOffset,
267→                                    "Expected a newline between the trailing comma and  \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
268→                                    true,
269→                                )
270→                                if (autoCorrect) {
271→                                    val parentIndent = "\n" + inspectNode.getWhenEntryIndent()
272→                                    lastNodeBeforeArrow.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(parentIndent)
273→                                }
274→                            }
275→                        }
276→                } else {
277→                    emit(
278→                        trailingCommaNode!!.startOffset,
279→                        "Unnecessary trailing comma before \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
280→                        true,
281→                    )
282→                    if (autoCorrect) {
283→                        this.removeChild(trailingCommaNode)
284→                    }
285→                }
286→            TrailingCommaState.MISSING ->
287→                if (isTrailingCommaAllowed) {
288→                    val addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhenEntry = addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhen()
289→                    val prevNode = inspectNode.prevCodeLeaf()!!
290→                    if (addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhenEntry) {
291→                        emit(
292→                            prevNode.startOffset + prevNode.textLength,
293→                            "Missing trailing comma and newline before \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
294→                            true,
295→                        )
296→                    } else {
297→                        emit(
298→                            prevNode.startOffset + prevNode.textLength,
299→                            "Missing trailing comma before \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
300→                            true,
301→                        )
302→                    }
303→                    if (autoCorrect) {
304→                        if (addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhenEntry) {
305→                            val parentIndent = "\n" + prevNode.getWhenEntryIndent()
306→                            val leafBeforeArrow = (psi as KtWhenEntry).arrow?.prevLeaf()
307→                            if (leafBeforeArrow != null && leafBeforeArrow is PsiWhiteSpace) {
308→                                val newLine = KtPsiFactory(prevNode.psi).createWhiteSpace(parentIndent)
309→                                leafBeforeArrow.replace(newLine)
310→                            } else {
311→                                val newLine = KtPsiFactory(prevNode.psi).createWhiteSpace(parentIndent)
312→                                prevNode.psi.parent.addAfter(newLine, prevNode.psi)
313→                            }
314→                        }
315→
316→                        val comma = KtPsiFactory(prevNode.psi).createComma()
317→                        if (inspectNode.treeParent.elementType == ElementType.ENUM_ENTRY) {
318→                            with(KtPsiFactory(prevNode.psi)) {
319→                                val parentIndent =
320→                                    (prevNode.psi.parent.prevLeaf() as? PsiWhiteSpace)?.text
321→                                        ?: "\n${prevNode.lineIndent()}"
322→                                val newline = createWhiteSpace(parentIndent)
323→                                val enumEntry = inspectNode.treeParent.psi
324→                                enumEntry.apply {
325→                                    inspectNode.psi.replace(comma)
326→                                    add(newline)
327→                                    add(createSemicolon())
328→                                }
329→                            }
330→                            Unit
331→                        } else {
332→                            prevNode.psi.parent.addAfter(comma, prevNode.psi)
333→                        }
334→                    }
335→                }
336→            TrailingCommaState.REDUNDANT -> {
337→                emit(
338→                    trailingCommaNode!!.startOffset,
339→                    "Unnecessary trailing comma before \"${inspectNode.text}\"",
340→                    true,
341→                )
342→                if (autoCorrect) {
343→                    this.removeChild(trailingCommaNode)
344→                }
345→            }
346→            TrailingCommaState.NOT_EXISTS -> Unit
347→        }
348→    }
349→
350→    private fun ASTNode.getWhenEntryIndent() =
351→        // The when entry can be a simple value but might also be a complex expression.
352→        parents()
353→            .last { it.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY }
354→            .lineIndent()
355→
356→    private fun isMultiline(element: PsiElement): Boolean =
357→        when {
358→            element.parent is KtFunctionLiteral -> {
359→                isMultiline(element.parent)
360→            }
361→            element is KtFunctionLiteral -> {
362→                containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(element.valueParameterList!!, element.arrow!!)
363→            }
364→            element is KtWhenEntry -> {
365→                containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(element.firstChild, element.arrow!!)
366→            }
367→            element is KtDestructuringDeclaration -> {
368→                containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(element.lPar!!, element.rPar!!)
369→            }
370→            element is KtValueArgumentList &&
371→                element.children.size == 1 &&
372→                element.anyDescendantOfType<KtCollectionLiteralExpression>() -> {
373→                // special handling for collection literal
374→                // @Annotation([
375→                //    "something",
376→                // ])
377→                val lastChild = element.collectDescendantsOfType<KtCollectionLiteralExpression>().last()
378→                containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(lastChild.rightBracket!!, element.rightParenthesis!!)
379→            }
380→            element is KtParameterList && element.parameters.isEmpty() -> {
381→                false
382→            }
383→            else -> {
384→                element.textContains('\n')
385→            }
386→        }
387→
388→    private fun ASTNode.addNewLineBeforeArrowInWhen() =
389→        if (psi is KtWhenEntry) {
390→            val leafBeforeArrow = (psi as KtWhenEntry).arrow?.prevLeaf()
391→            !(leafBeforeArrow is PsiWhiteSpace && leafBeforeArrow.textContains('\n'))
392→        } else {
393→            false
394→        }
395→
396→    private fun ASTNode.findPreviousTrailingCommaNodeOrNull(): ASTNode? {
397→        val codeLeaf = if (isCodeLeaf()) {
398→            this
399→        } else {
400→            prevCodeLeaf()
401→        }
402→        return codeLeaf?.takeIf { it.elementType == ElementType.COMMA }
403→    }
404→
405→    private fun containsLineBreakInLeavesRange(
406→        from: PsiElement,
407→        to: PsiElement,
408→    ): Boolean {
409→        var leaf: PsiElement? = from
410→        while (leaf != null && !leaf.isEquivalentTo(to)) {
411→            if (leaf.textContains('\n')) {
412→                return true
413→            }
414→            leaf = leaf.nextLeaf(skipEmptyElements = false)
415→        }
416→        return leaf?.textContains('\n') ?: false
417→    }
418→
419→    private enum class TrailingCommaState {
420→        /**
421→         * The trailing comma is needed and exists
422→         */
423→        EXISTS,
424→
425→        /**
426→         * The trailing comma is needed and doesn't exist
427→         */
428→        MISSING,
429→
430→        /**
431→         * The trailing comma isn't needed and doesn't exist
432→         */
433→        NOT_EXISTS,
434→
435→        /**
436→         * The trailing comma isn't needed, but exists
437→         */
438→        REDUNDANT,
439→    }
